focus_points.label: CoE vs AZP context switching friction
focus_points.reason: Carl is finding it hard to deal with CoE and AZP app moving between two very different projects. One possibility is that the switching cost is eating focus time, but it could also be unclear ownership boundaries or competing priorities—worth clarifying what part feels hardest right now.

focus_points.label: Which project gets his best attention
focus_points.reason: Whether the sequence of his top priorities is still coherent across the two streams—so he isn’t implicitly overcommitting to both at once.

focus_points.label: Workload split across two project streams
focus_points.reason: Whether his capacity is being stretched by the overlap between CoE and AZP work, and whether the current split is sustainable for the next two weeks.
